description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build job that runs in the build stage using the ruby:2 Docker image, executes `bundle install` then `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, and stores the `public` directory as an artifact. Add a test job that runs in the test stage using the 18fgsa/html-proofer:gitlab-ci image and runs `htmlproofer public --empty-alt-ignore`. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, triggers only on the master branch, runs `find public`, and publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
